title: Refund Policy
text: Refunds are available within 30 days of purchase. Digital products are non-refundable after download.

title: Billing FAQ
text: Customers can request refunds by emailing billing@company.com. Refund processing usually takes 5 to 7 business days.

title: Defective Product Exception
text: In cases of defective digital products full refunds are guaranteed regardless of download status.

title: Old Subscription FAQ
text: All subscription purchases are final sale and cannot be refunded.

title: New Subscription Policy
text: Subscriptions may be refunded within 14 days if the service was not heavily used.

title: Password Reset
text: To reset your password click Forgot Password on the sign-in page and follow the email link.

title: API Rate Limits
text: The public API allows 100 requests per minute on the basic plan and 1000 requests per minute on the enterprise plan.

title: Shipping Support
text: Physical orders can be tracked from the orders page and usually arrive within 3 to 5 business days.
